note: scores are fp32 logits exactly as the Python pipeline computes them: J-lens = unembed(final_norm(J_l @ h)); logit lens = unembed(final_norm(h)); h = block-output residual.

prompts.text: Once upon a time there was a little girl named Lily. She had a dog named Max. One day
Ben broke his mom's favorite vase. He heard her coming.
It was a dark night. Tim heard a strange noise in the garden.
